conflictBlocks.oursContent:
import { verify } from "argon2";
import crypto from "crypto";
conflictBlocks.theirsContent:
import { verify, hash } from "argon2";
import crypto from "crypto";

conflictBlocks.oursContent:
// Avoid logging PII like email in production logs
    console.log(`✅ [Login] User authenticated: ${user.user_id}`);
conflictBlocks.theirsContent:
// ✅ PII-SAFE: Log with user_id only, never email
    console.log(`✅ [Login] User authenticated: ${user.user_id}`);

conflictBlocks.oursContent:
// Avoid logging PII like email in production logs
    console.log(`✅ [Signup] Created user: ${user.user_id}`);
conflictBlocks.theirsContent:
// Create driver profile
    await sql`
      INSERT INTO driver_profiles (
        user_id, 
        legal_name, 
        dob, 
        address, 
        status
      )
      VALUES (
        ${user.user_id},
        ${name},
        '1990-01-01',
        ${JSON.stringify({ street: "", city: "", state: "", zip: "", country: "US" })},
        'pending'
      )
    `;

preservedBehaviors.description: Login route uses rate limiting, email normalization, and argon2 verify with timing attack protection
Login route has account lockout via login_attempts table (5 failures = 15min lock)
Login route returns generic 'Invalid email or password' error (no user enumeration)
Login route creates session with JWT token, refresh token, and ip_metadata
Login route resets failed login attempts on successful authentication
Signup validates email format (regex), length (254 max), and password length (min/max)
Signup sanitizes name by removing <>'"& characters and truncating to 100 chars
Signup creates user with driver role and handles duplicate key constraint (23505)
OTP route validates E.164 phone format, generates 6-digit OTP, stores in sessions table
OTP route includes debug_otp only in non-production environment
Layout is a 'use client' component with QueryClient and staleTime/retry config
Login imports only { verify } from argon2 (not hash -- hash is only needed in signup)
Layout includes <html> and <body> tags wrapping the content
Signup has exactly one crypto import (no duplicate)
Layout wraps children in ErrorBoundary with name='RootLayout'
Signup creates driver_profiles row with legal_name, dob, address (US default), status 'pending'
Signup has error cleanup that deletes user if driver profile creation fails
OTP response includes success: true, message: 'OTP sent successfully'
OTP dev response includes warning about debug exposure
OTP logging masks phone number to last 4 digits for PII safety
